---
title: "Clustering II"
subtitle: "Gaussian mixture models"
date: "Oct 16, 2026"
date-format: long
---

Gaussian mixture models as soft clustering; the EM algorithm; model selection via BIC; comparing GMMs to k-means.

📖 **Assigned reading:** PRML §9.1–9.2

---

## 📊 Slides

- 🖥️ [Clean slides](slides_clean.pdf)
- ✏️ [Annotated slides](slides_annotated.pdf)  *(in-class version)*

## 📚 Readings

- 📄 [Altman and Krzywinski (2017)](readings/Altman and Krzywinski (2017).pdf)
- 📄 [Garcia-Vidal et al. (2024)](readings/Garcia-Vidal et al. (2024).pdf)

## 🧪 Lab

In-class walkthrough — open the rendered lab in a new tab. The R Markdown source is provided so you can run the code yourself in RStudio.

- 🧪 [class8 lab1 (HTML)](code/class8_lab1.html){target="_blank"}
- 🧪 [lab1 (HTML)](code/lab1.html){target="_blank"}
- 📝 [Lab source (lab1.Rmd)](code/lab1.Rmd)

## 💻 Code

**Figure scripts** — reproduce each figure from the slides:

- 📈 [fig1.R](code/fig1.R)
- 📈 [fig2.R](code/fig2.R)

**Interactive demos** — Shiny apps (run locally with `shiny::runApp()`):

- 🎛️ [app1.R](code/app1.R)
